Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Copper sight]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Copper sight allows Lindon to see aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Copper sight is a way of seeing that makes the Transcendent Ruins look ominous.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Copper sight allows the user to see aura as colored light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon attempted to open his Copper sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Copper sight is a technique Lindon uses to sense things.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Pai Ren has a Copper sight that he can close.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon can use Copper sight.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon uses Copper sight to see ribbons of color representing wind, earth, and life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Copper sight can be opened but causes pain in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon did not open his Copper sight because the aura was too strong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — In Lindon's Copper sight, the Emperor's aura burned a pale green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Copper sight is a sensory ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon cannot open his Copper sight in the current location.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses Copper sight to see clouds of fire and destruction aura.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Kerani can use a technique called Copper sight.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — In Copper sight, wind aura appears as a strong, vivid green.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
